title: acalypha lyonsii
intro: Acalypha lyonsii, also known as the Lyons' Copperleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Acalypha lyonsii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and support the immune system. Acalypha lyonsii can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
